infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ExamGuard uses the camera to scan and verify student identity during exam entry and attendance sessions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ExamGuard may use the microphone during face scan video processing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ExamGuard needs access to your photo library to upload profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ExamGuard uses your location to verify that attendance is being marked at the correct exam venue.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: ExamGuard uses Face ID for secure device authentication.

web.name: ExamGuard
web.description: Secure Exam Monitoring & Identity Verification Platform

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ExamGuard to access your camera for face identity verification during exams and attendance marking.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ExamGuard to use your location to verify attendance is marked at the correct exam venue.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ExamGuard to access your photos for profile picture upload.

extra.appDescription: ExamGuard — Secure Exam Monitoring, Anti-Proxy Detection & Face-Based Identity Verification
